task_completion.description: Check if the branch release/v1.5.0 was created from main.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Azure DevOps Repos section with the branch `release/v1.5.0` selected or listed.

task_completion.description: Check if config.py was edited correctly on the release branch.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of `config.py` showing `VERSION = '1.5.0'` added inside `class ProductionConfig` and the `config` dictionary at the bottom showing `'default': ProductionConfig`.

task_completion.description: Check if the two active P1 bugs were tagged as release blockers and commented.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the work items 'Product price calculation returns incorrect values...' and 'Inventory count becomes negative...' showing the tag `release-blocker` and the comment 'Blocks v1.5.0 release — must resolve before shipping.'.

task_completion.description: Check if the Wiki page 'Release v1.5.0' has a 'Completed Items' section with the 5 resolved/closed items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Wiki page showing the 'Completed Items' section listing the 5 completed items (see privileged info) along with their IDs.

task_completion.description: Check if the Wiki page has a 'Known Issues' section with the 2 blocker bugs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Wiki page showing the 'Known Issues' section listing the 2 active P1 bugs along with their IDs.

task_completion.description: Check if the Wiki page has a 'Release Date' section with the correct date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Wiki page showing the 'Release Date' section containing 'March 22, 2026'.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the Azure DevOps web UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating the Azure DevOps web interface (Repos, Boards, Wiki) rather than running curl/API commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent did not tag non-blocker items.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Boards or work items do not show the `release-blocker` tag on the Resolved P1 bug ('API returns 500 error...') or the Active P2 task ('Write integration tests...').

integrity.description: Verifies the Wiki page was created in the actual Azure DevOps Wiki.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Wiki page is shown within the Azure DevOps Wiki interface, not in a local markdown file or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 5 completed items (Resolved/Closed) to be listed in the Wiki are: 'Implement product inventory search with full-text filtering', 'Design REST API rate limiting and authentication middleware', 'API returns 500 error when filtering products with special characters in category name', 'Set up PostgreSQL database migration scripts for v2.0 schema changes', and 'Configure CI/CD pipeline for automated testing and staging deployment'. The 2 release blockers (Active P1 Bugs) to be tagged and listed in Known Issues are: 'Product price calculation returns incorrect values for bulk discount tiers' and 'Inventory count becomes negative after concurrent stock deduction requests'. The Active P2 Task 'Write integration tests for inventory deduction API endpoint' and the Resolved P1 Bug 'API returns 500 error...' must NOT be tagged as release blockers. The config.py file must be edited on the release/v1.5.0 branch to add VERSION = '1.5.0' to ProductionConfig and change the default config to ProductionConfig.
